title: Rubrics, Model Judges, Pairwise Comparison, Human Calibration, and Uncertainty · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in calibrated mixed-method evaluation board and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Define observable task-specific criteria, anchors, critical failures, accessibility, safety, evidence, and scoring aggregation before viewing candidate outputs.
Blind model, prompt, provider, and treatment identity; randomize order; use pairwise comparison when it improves judgment reliability.
Measure repeatability, position effects, rubric sensitivity, reference leakage, adversarial manipulation, and judge-version drift.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Eval Precedence Uncertainty
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-eval-precedence-uncertainty-19180h" that uses case 7846 to use task-specific rubrics, blinded comparisons, judge variance tests, human calibration, disagreement review, and uncertainty escalation. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-eval-precedence-uncertainty-19180h
# Competency: agentpy-eval-precedence-uncertainty.
# Case 7846: an accessible public-service intake assistant.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_eval_precedence_uncertainty_19180h(rubric_cases: int = 60, blinded_cases: int = 60, human_calibration_cases: int = 18, disagreement_cases: int = 7, silent_overrides: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_19180h = "19180h-h08191-7846"
    assert evidence_variant_19180h
    evidence_axes_19180h = (
        "authority19180h",
        "interaction7846",
        "toolh08191",
        "state19180h7846",
        "evaluation784619180h",
        "recoveryh081917846",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_19180h)) == 6
    if rubric_cases < 30 or blinded_cases != rubric_cases:
        return False, blinded_cases, "rubric-blinding"
    if human_calibration_cases < 12:
        return False, human_calibration_cases, "human-calibration"
    if disagreement_cases < 1:
        return False, disagreement_cases, "judge-disagreement"
    if silent_overrides > 0:
        return False, silent_overrides, "silent-judge-override"
    assert blinded_cases == rubric_cases and silent_overrides == 0
    return True, human_calibration_cases, "calibrated-agent-judgment"
